history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with light skin, a black beanie, and tattoos on his neck is sitting in a car. He is wearing a dark green zip-up hoodie over a white tank top. The hoodie has large white graphic designs on the front. He is looking at the camera and holding up his left hand, showing two fingers extended in a "peace" or "victory" gesture. The interior of the car is visible behind him, with dark, textured surfaces. The lighting appears to be natural, coming from outside the car, and casts soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and urban.
